title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.240 - Director of revenue to cooperate with other states
text:
301.240.  Director of revenue to cooperate with other states. — The director of revenue shall cooperate with the commissioners or the officials of other states and countries having supervision of the registration of motor vehicles and shall exchange information with them relative to the registration, ownership, sale and theft of motor vehicles, for the purpose of suppressing the stealing and unauthorized use of motor vehicles.
(RSMo 1939 § 8382, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 380) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7774
